expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: blind scenario drafting captures prompt handling, template save, report builder loading, and visible report title outcomes
expectations.evidence: In result.md, the scenario draft explicitly includes dedicated sections and scenarios for all four focus areas: "Prompt handling (prompt-editor ↔ report-builder interaction)", "Report Builder loading", "Template save", and "Visible report title outcomes (window title correctness on edit + after save)". The opening also states: "Demonstrate that Phase 4a scenario drafting ... explicitly captures ... prompt handling, template save, report builder loading, visible report title outcomes."

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: execution_notes.md states Phase 4a constraints were enforced ("Used to enforce Phase 4a constraints (subcategory-only, atomic nested steps, replay-anchor requirements for report-editor)") and confirms "Subcategory-first structure preserved". result.md is explicitly labeled "Phase 4a scenario drafting" and uses a subcategory-only nested structure under "Report Editor" without introducing canonical top-level categories, matching the stated Phase 4a alignment.
